requirement_topic.en: Portable Lithium Cell and Battery Pack Safety — AS/NZS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 便携式锂电芯及电池组安全——AS/NZS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全——AS/NZS IEC 62133

summary.en: AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 is commonly used in Australia and New Zealand as technical evidence for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries used in portable applications. It addresses safety tests such as external short circuit, free fall, thermal abuse, crush, overcharge, and forced discharge. For EESS in-scope electrical equipment, the Responsible Supplier must hold evidence that the equipment is electrically safe and meets relevant standards. AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 is a voluntary technical route unless it is incorporated by a legal instrument, regulator rule, certification scheme, or customer specification.
summary.zh: AS/NZS IEC 62133-2在澳大利亚和新西兰常被用作便携式应用中密封二次锂电芯及电池的技术证据。其覆盖外部短路、自由跌落、热滥用、挤压、过充及强制放电等安全测试。对于EESS适用电气设备，责任供应商必须持有设备电气安全且符合相关标准的证据。除非被法律文书、监管规则、认证方案或客户规范纳入，AS/NZS IEC 62133-2属于自愿技术路径。
summary.zht: AS/NZS IEC 62133-2在澳洲和紐西蘭常被用作便攜式應用中密封二次鋰電芯及電池的技術證據。其覆蓋外部短路、自由跌落、熱濫用、擠壓、過充及強制放電等安全測試。對於EESS適用電氣設備，責任供應商必須持有設備電氣安全且符合相關標準的證據。除非被法律文書、監管規則、認證方案或客戶規範納入，AS/NZS IEC 62133-2屬於自願技術路徑。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — voluntary technical evidence unless incorporated
EESS Equipment Safety Rules and Responsible Supplier Declaration — mandatory where equipment is in scope
Australian Consumer Law safety obligations — mandatory

summary.en: GB 31241-2022 is China's principal safety standard for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment. It is technically related to IEC 62133-2 but includes Chinese national requirements and is used for China-market compliance. A GB 31241 report can help the Australian assessment but should not be presented as an AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 report unless the laboratory scope, test method, samples, and report explicitly cover the AS/NZS or IEC standard.
summary.zh: GB 31241-2022是中国便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池的主要安全标准。其与IEC 62133-2存在技术关联，但包含中国国家要求，并用于中国市场合规。GB 31241报告可辅助澳大利亚评估，但除非实验室范围、测试方法、样品及报告明确覆盖AS/NZS或IEC标准，否则不应将其作为AS/NZS IEC 62133-2报告提交。
summary.zht: GB 31241-2022是中國便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池的主要安全標準。其與IEC 62133-2存在技術關聯，但包含中國國家要求，並用於中國市場合規。GB 31241報告可輔助澳洲評估，但除非實驗室範圍、測試方法、樣品及報告明確覆蓋AS/NZS或IEC標準，否則不應將其作為AS/NZS IEC 62133-2報告提交。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment
IEC 62133-2 test evidence where separately commissioned by the exporter
CCC requirements where applicable to the China-market product category

gap.en: The main gap is report identity and applicability. Australian importers often need an English report, laboratory accreditation scope, critical component list, model-family rationale, and confirmation that the tested cell and pack configuration match the SKU supplied. A Chinese GB report may not cover Australian labelling, plug-pack integration, thermal enclosure conditions, model variants, or the Responsible Supplier's EESS compliance folder.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于报告身份及适用性。澳大利亚进口商通常需要英文报告、实验室认可范围、关键部件清单、型号系列划分依据，以及被测试电芯和电池组配置与供应SKU一致的确认。中国GB报告可能不覆盖澳大利亚标签、插墙电源集成、热外壳条件、型号变体或责任供应商的EESS合规文件夹。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於報告身份及適用性。澳洲進口商通常需要英文報告、實驗室認可範圍、關鍵部件清單、型號系列劃分依據，以及被測試電芯和電池組配置與供應SKU一致的確認。中國GB報告可能不覆蓋澳洲標籤、插牆電源整合、熱外殼條件、型號變體或責任供應商的EESS合規文件夾。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory duties, voluntary standard route — Australian Consumer Law and EESS evidence obligations are mandatory where applicable; AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 is a voluntary technical evidence route unless incorporated by law, regulator rule, certification condition, or contract
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for relevant China-market products — GB 31241-2022 may be required domestically; it is not automatically accepted as AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not label AS/NZS IEC 62133-2 itself as universally mandatory for every power bank. Use it as the preferred Australian technical evidence route for portable lithium cell and pack safety, then connect that evidence to the mandatory Australian Consumer Law and EESS duties where the product is in scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】不要将AS/NZS IEC 62133-2本身称为适用于所有移动电源的普遍强制要求。应将其作为便携式锂电芯及电池组安全的优先澳大利亚技术证据路径，再把该证据关联到适用产品的澳大利亚消费者法及EESS强制义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】不要將AS/NZS IEC 62133-2本身稱為適用於所有行動電源的普遍強制要求。應將其作為便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全的優先澳洲技術證據路徑，再把該證據關聯到適用產品的澳洲消費者法及EESS強制義務。
